evals.prompt: Who's on-call right now for the Checkout team?
evals.expected_output: Uses curl against the PagerDuty REST API to look up the on-call schedule or escalation policy for the Checkout team, and displays the current on-call person(s) with their name(s) and contact info.

evals.prompt: List all open P1 and P2 incidents and resolve the ones assigned to me.
evals.expected_output: Uses curl to list open incidents from the PagerDuty API, filters for P1/P2 priority using jq, identifies which are assigned to the current user, and resolves them via PUT requests to the incidents endpoint.
